31:2:1.m: that (pointing to something far away, feminine) (describes ءَايٰتُ)

31:2:4.m: of the wise one (describing ٱلْكِتٰبِ - the book)

31:3:3.m: for those who do good (guidance and mercy for them)

31:4:3.m: the ritual prayer (object of يُقِيمُونَ - they establish)

31:4:4.m: and they give/bring forth (connected to يُقِيمُونَ - they establish)

31:4:5.m: the obligatory charity (that they give يُؤْتُونَ)

31:4:9.m: they are completely sure (referring to those who establish prayer and give zakah)

31:5:1.m: those ones there (far away) (subject of هُمُ)

31:6:7.m: in order to make (someone) go astray

31:6:12.m: any knowledge (used after بِغَيْرِ meaning 'without any')

31:6:13.m: and he takes/adopts it (سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ) as mockery

31:6:14.m: as mockery (object of يَتَّخِذَهَا - takes it)

31:7:9.m: he hears it (referring to ءَايٰتُنَا - our verses)

31:7:14.m: so give him good news! (sarcastic command in response to وَلَّىٰ مُسْتَكْبِرًا - he turned away arrogantly)

31:7:15.m: with a punishment (object of فَبَشِّرْهُ - give him glad tidings)

31:8:4.m: and they did (connected to ءَامَنُوا - they believed)

31:9:1.m: ones who are remaining forever (describes the believers in Paradise)

31:10:2.m: the heavens (object of خَلَقَ - He created)

31:10:5.m: you all see it (referring to the heavens/السَّمٰوٰتِ)

31:10:9.m: mountains (that Allah placed in the earth)

31:10:10.m: that/so that (connects to تَمِيدَ - it would sway)

31:10:15.m: from/of (connects كُلِّ to what comes before it)

31:10:21.m: water (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)

31:10:22.m: and so we made (something) grow (after sending down water from the sky)

31:10:23.m: in it (referring to الأرض - the earth)

31:10:24.m: from (connects كُلِّ to what comes before it)

31:11:4.m: so show me! (command to a group)

31:11:11.m: the ones who act unjustly (as subject)

31:12:7.m: for/to Allah (connected to ٱشْكُرْ - give thanks)

31:12:10.m: then surely only (connected to كَفَرَ - whoever disbelieved)

31:12:14.m: he rejected/was ungrateful (opposite of يَشْكُرْ in this ayah)

31:12:15.m: then indeed (connects to يَشْكُرُ - he thanks)

31:12:18.m: praiseworthy (describing Allah as deserving all praise)

31:13:1.m: and when (introducing Luqman's advice to his son)

إِذْ: when (introducing Luqman's advice to his son)

31:13:9.m: associate partners! (negative command - don't do this)

31:13:10.m: with/by Allah (object of تُشْرِكْ - associate partners)

31:13:12.m: the act of associating partners (object of تُشْرِكْ)

31:13:13.m: surely a wrongdoing (describing الشِّرْكَ/associating partners with Allah)

31:14:2.m: the human being (object of وَصَّيْنَا - we instructed)

31:14:7.m: upon (describing the state of weakness in وَهْنٍ)

31:14:10.m: in, within (connected to عَامَيْنِ - two years)

31:14:12.m: that (introduces the command اشْكُرْ - be grateful)

31:15:2.m: they both tried with you (referring to parents trying to influence their child)

ىٰٓ: extension of sound to show emphasis

31:15:4.m: that (introduces what they are trying to make you do)

31:15:5.m: you join (as partners with بِى - with Me)

31:15:9.m: for you (object of تُشْرِكَ - associate partners)

31:15:20.m: whoever (the path of the one who)

31:15:22.m: to me (connected to مَرْجِعُكُمْ - your return)

31:15:26.m: Then I will inform you all

31:15:27.m: with what/whatever (that you used to do)

31:15:28.m: you all were (referring to what you all used to do)

31:16:2.m: indeed it (referring to the tiny deed mentioned after)

هَآ: it (referring to the tiny deed mentioned after)

31:16:8.m: a mustard seed (object of مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنْ - 'weight of a seed of')

31:16:9.m: then it is (referring to حَبَّةٍ - seed)

31:16:18.m: he comes/is coming (command form after فَ)

31:16:19.m: with it/her (referring to حَبَّةٍ - a seed)

31:16:22.m: Allah (as the object of يَأْتِ - He brings)

َ: (as the object of يَأْتِ - He brings)

31:16:23.m: Most Gentle and Kind (a name of Allah)

31:17:6.m: and stop! (command to stop something wrong)

31:17:8.m: of the wrong/evil deed (object of عَنِ)

31:17:9.m: and be patient! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

31:17:12.m: afflicted you/befell you (referring to what befalls you in life)

31:17:14.m: that (used to point to something mentioned)

31:18:6.m: walk (as in 'do not walk') (connected to مَرَحًا/proudly)

تَمْشِ: walk (as in 'do not walk') (connected to مَرَحًا/proudly)

31:18:13.m: he loves (subject of لا in لا يُحِبُّ)

31:18:14.m: every, all (object of لا يُحِبُّ - does not love)

31:18:15.m: an arrogant one (described in this ayah as someone Allah does not love)

ٍ: (described in this ayah as someone Allah does not love)

31:19:3.m: your walking (object of اقصد/be moderate in)

31:19:4.m: and lower! (command to one person to lower their voice)

31:19:6.m: your voice (object of وَٱغْضُضْ مِن - lower from)

31:19:8.m: he made someone deny/caused to deny

31:19:9.m: of the sounds/voices (after the word أَنكَرَ - most disagreeable)

31:20:1.m: Have (you) not...? (expecting 'yes, we have' as answer)

31:20:2.m: you (all) see (after أَلَمْ meaning 'do you not')

31:20:4.m: Allah (as the object of أَنَّ - that)

31:20:5.m: He made (something) completely subservient (to لَكُم - for you all)

31:20:11.m: in (location of what is in ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)

31:20:16.m: apparent/visible (feminine, as a description of نِعَمَهُۥ/His favors)

31:21:6.m: he sent down (what اللَّهُ sent down)

31:21:8.m: they said (responding to what was told to them)

ا۟: (responding to what was told to them)

31:21:17.m: Satan (as the subject who يَدْعُوهُمْ/calls them)

31:22:7.m: a doer of good (describes someone who submits)

31:22:11.m: the most firm/reliable (feminine) (describes العروة - the handhold)

31:22:13.m: of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes before)

31:23:8.m: then we will inform them emphatically (about بِمَا عَمِلُوٓا۟)

31:24:1.m: we let them enjoy greatly (present tense) (followed by قَلِيلًا - a little while)

31:25:2.m: you asked them (about مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ - who created the heavens and earth)

31:25:3.m: who (asking about the creator of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)

31:25:4.m: he created (subject of لَيَقُولُنَّ - they will surely say)

َ: (subject of لَيَقُولُنَّ - they will surely say)

31:25:7.m: they will surely say (with strong emphasis)

31:25:10.m: all praise (subject of this part of the ayah)

ُ: (subject of this part of the ayah)

31:25:15.m: they know (referring to most people mentioned in أَكْثَرُهُمْ)

31:26:1.m: to/for Allah (belongs what is in السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)

31:26:4.m: of the heavens (possessed by/belonging to اللَّهِ)

31:26:5.m: and the earth (possessed by/connected to something)

31:26:9.m: The Completely Free from Need (subject of this phrase)

31:27:5.m: from (connects شَجَرَةٍ to what comes before it)

31:27:9.m: he extends it (referring to البَحْرُ - the sea)

31:27:10.m: from (connecting شَجَرَةٍ to what comes after)

31:27:16.m: words (subject of the sentence, belonging to اللَّهِ)

تُ: subject of the sentence, belonging to اللَّهِ

31:27:18.m: indeed/certainly (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ)

31:27:19.m: Allah (as the object being described in this ayah)

َ: (as the object being described in this ayah)

31:29:4.m: Allah (the one true deity being acted upon)

31:29:6.m: the night (object of يُولِجُ - merges into)

31:29:10.m: the daytime (object of يُولِجُ - merges/causes to enter)

31:29:13.m: and he made (something) serve (a purpose) (controls الشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ - the sun and moon)

سَخَّرَ: he made (something) serve (a purpose) (controls الشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ - the sun and moon)

31:30:3.m: Allah (as the object of أَنَّ - that)

31:30:11.m: the falsehood (opposite of ٱلْحَقُّ/the truth in this ayah)

31:30:12.m: and that/and indeed (emphasizes ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْعَلِىُّ)

31:30:13.m: Allah (as the object being referred to)

31:30:15.m: The Most High (one of Allah's names)

31:30:16.m: The Most Great (divine attribute of Allah describing His supreme greatness)

31:31:5.m: it/she flows/sails (referring to الْفُلْكَ, the ship)

31:31:7.m: the sea (location where ٱلْفُلْكَ تَجْرِى/the ships sail)

31:31:10.m: so that he shows you all

31:31:13.m: indeed, certainly (introduces a statement in this ayah)

إِنَّ: indeed, certainly (introduces a statement in this ayah)

31:32:5.m: they called upon (subject of calling upon اللَّهَ)

31:32:6.m: Allah (as the one being called upon in دَعَوُا۟)

َ: as the one being called upon

31:32:9.m: the religion/way of life (object of دَعَوُا۟)

31:32:18.m: with/by our signs (object of يَجْحَدُ - denies/rejects)

31:33:4.m: your Lord (addressing all people in ayah)

31:33:5.m: and all of you fear! (plural command)

31:33:10.m: from/on behalf of (connects جَازٍ with وَالِدِ)

31:33:13.m: a born one (describing someone in this ayah who cannot help their parent)

ٌ: (describing someone in this ayah who cannot help their parent)

31:33:15.m: one who repays (in a possessive relationship)

31:34:6.m: and he sends down repeatedly (subject of إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ)

31:34:8.m: and he knows (connected to يُنَزِّلُ - he sends down)

31:34:10.m: in (location of ما 'what' in the wombs)

31:34:15.m: what thing (emphasizing the question in تَكْسِبُ 'it earns')

31:34:20.m: a self, a soul, a person

31:34:21.m: by which/what (asking about location in أَرْضٍ)

31:34:27.m: All-Aware (as an independent quality of Allah)
